# [Lending stack] DSP lender assignment logics

# **How are others solving this problem?**

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

For beta release:

1. **Platform whitelisting:** Have to implement a platform check to make sure only users coming from certain platforms can be assigned DSP as lender. For Beta phase: Only **Volt app and Volt website** platforms will be whitelisted. 
2. **Eligible credit limit check:** Users with an eligible credit limit of more than 2Cr should NOT be assigned DSP as lender. All the users with an eligible credit limit of lower than ₹25k but higher than ₹10k should ONLY be assigned DSP as lender.
3. **Round robin assignment logic:** Users who are eligible for other lenders will be assigned lender on the basis of round robin assignment. XX% of such applications should be routed to DSP Fin. (% to be finalised with business, will increase as confidence in system grows)

## Requirements

Acceptance criterias:

1. Only direct B2C (Volt app and Volt website) users should be assigned to DSP
2. XX% of the direct B2C users should be assigned to DSP
3. Cases lower than 25k should only be assigned to DSP
4. Cases where the eligible limit is more than 2 Cr should not be assigned DSP lender
5. Cases lower than 10K should not be allowed to proceed with the application
